						    Source = Sql.Database("VNICC-DB002-MIS", "ICC_Technical_Data", [Query="WITH GasData AS#(lf)(#(lf)    SELECT#(lf)        v.DataCollectionDate AS Date,#(lf)        v.FactoryName AS Plant,#(lf)        u.[GHG Source],#(lf)        u.Value#(lf)    FROM dbo.View_BI_Energy_Summary v#(lf)    CROSS APPLY#(lf)    (#(lf)        VALUES#(lf)            ('Waste Water', v.WasteWater),#(lf)            ('R134A', v.ChemicalR134a),#(lf)            ('R410A', v.ChemicalR410a),#(lf)            ('R404A', v.ChemicalR404a),#(lf)            ('Co2 @ Packing', v.Co2Packing),#(lf)            ('Co2 @ PCCC', v.Co2Pccc)#(lf)    ) u ([GHG Source], Value)#(lf)),#(lf)#(lf)ConsumptionData AS#(lf)(#(lf)    SELECT#(lf)        DataCollectionDate AS Date,#(lf)        FactoryName AS Plant,#(lf)        EmissionCategory AS [GHG Source],#(lf)        ConsumptionQty AS Value#(lf)    FROM dbo.View_BI_Energy_Summary#(lf)    WHERE EmissionCategory <> 'Water'#(lf)),#(lf)#(lf)Combined AS#(lf)(#(lf)    SELECT * FROM GasData#(lf)    UNION ALL#(lf)    SELECT * FROM ConsumptionData#(lf)),#(lf)#(lf)Scaled AS#(lf)(#(lf)    SELECT#(lf)        EOMONTH(Date) AS Date,#(lf)        Plant,#(lf)        REPLACE([GHG Source],'Wood','Firewood') AS [GHG Source],#(lf)#(lf)        CASE#(lf)            WHEN REPLACE([GHG Source],'Wood','Firewood') IN ('Firewood','LPG')#(lf)            THEN CAST(Value AS FLOAT)/1000.0#(lf)            ELSE CAST(Value AS FLOAT)#(lf)        END AS Value#(lf)    FROM Combined#(lf))#(lf)#(lf)SELECT DISTINCT#(lf)    Date,#(lf)    Plant,#(lf)    [GHG Source],#(lf)    Value,#(lf)#(lf)    CASE#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Firewood' THEN 'Boiler'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Waste Water' THEN 'WWTS'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='LPG' THEN 'Forklift '#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Diesel' THEN 'Other Vehicles'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source] IN ('R134A','R410A','R404A') THEN 'Refrigeration & A/C'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Co2 @ Packing' THEN 'Packing'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Co2 @ PCCC' THEN 'PCCC'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Electricity' THEN 'Electricity'#(lf)    END AS Process,#(lf)#(lf)    CASE#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Firewood' THEN 'ton'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Waste Water' THEN 'cubic metres'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='LPG' THEN 'ton'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Diesel' THEN 'litres'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source] IN ('R134A','R410A','R404A','Co2 @ Packing','Co2 @ PCCC') THEN 'kg'#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Electricity' THEN 'kWh'#(lf)    END AS Unit,#(lf)#(lf)    CASE#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Electricity' THEN 'Scope 2'#(lf)        ELSE 'Scope 1'#(lf)    END AS Scope,#(lf)#(lf)    CASE#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Firewood' THEN 43.89327#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Waste Water' THEN 0.201318291710656#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='LPG' THEN 2939.36094899329#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Diesel' THEN 2.51206388456376#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='R134A' THEN 1300#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='R410A' THEN 3943#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='R404A' THEN 1924#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Co2 @ Packing' THEN 1#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Co2 @ PCCC' THEN 1#(lf)        ELSE 0.8041#(lf)    END AS ConversionRate,#(lf)#(lf)    Value *#(lf)    CASE#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Firewood' THEN 43.89327#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Waste Water' THEN 0.201318291710656#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='LPG' THEN 2939.36094899329#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Diesel' THEN 2.51206388456376#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='R134A' THEN 1300#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='R410A' THEN 3943#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='R404A' THEN 1924#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Co2 @ Packing' THEN 1#(lf)        WHEN [GHG Source]='Co2 @ PCCC' THEN 1#(lf)        ELSE 0.8041#(lf)    END AS [YTD Value]#(lf)#(lf)FROM Scaled#(lf)WHERE Value IS NOT NULL"])
						in
						    Source

			partition Dim_date = calculated
				mode: import
				source =
						ADDCOLUMNS(
						CALENDAR(Min(Fact_Co2[Date]),Max(Fact_Co2[Date])),
						"Year",YEAR([Date]),
						"Quarter", "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ),
						"Month", MONTH([Date]),
						"Month Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm" ),
						"Week", FORMAT ( [Date], "ww" ),
						"WeekDay", WEEKDAY([Date]),
						"Day", DAY([Date]),
						"YearMonth" , FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm/YYYY" ),
						"YearMonth2" , FORMAT ( [Date], "mm" )&"/"&YEAR([Date]),
						"YearQuarter" , YEAR([Date])&"-"& "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ),
						"YearQuarter2" , "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ) &"/"& YEAR([Date]) ,
						"YearMonthSort", YEAR([Date])*100 + MONTH([Date]),
						"YearQuarterSort" ,YEAR([Date])*10 + FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" )
						)

		table _measure
			lineageTag: ce9c268c-7d9e-4cf7-9e64-32a8c9952a68

			measure _metric_select =
					SWITCH(SELECTEDVALUE(_metric_select[ID]),
					 1,SUM(Fact_Co2[YTD Value]),
					 2,DIVIDE(SUM(Fact_Co2[YTD Value]),SUM(Fact_CK[YTD Value])),
					 3,DIVIDE(SUM(Fact_Co2[YTD Value]),SUM(Fact_Production[YTD Value])),
					 BLANK())
				formatString: #,0.00
				lineageTag: 1390c953-c345-46fb-a978-460a62312e71

			measure _metric_previous =
					
					var x =
					SWITCH( SELECTEDVALUE(_period_select[_period_para Order]),
					0, CALCULATE([_metric_select], DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),MONTH)),
					1, CALCULATE([_metric_select], DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),QUARTER)),
					2, CALCULATE([_metric_select], DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),YEAR)),
					BLANK())
					return
					x
				formatString: #,0.00
				lineageTag: 1d1c2f17-4f5b-462e-bda5-7c1a4b256c4a

			measure Tooltip_change = ```
					
					var X = DIVIDE( [_metric_select] - [_metric_previous], [_metric_previous], BLANK())
					RETURN
					if( [_metric_previous] <> BLANK(),  FORMAT( X ,"Percent") &  IF(X < 0, " 🟢 🔻", " 🔴 🔺") ) 
					```
				lineageTag: a1c4d6bc-ea9a-48e7-82bf-aaba75018718

			measure Subtitle = ```
					"Latest update: "&

					BLANK()) 
					VAR _PM = CALCULATE(MAX(Dim_date[YearMonth]), DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),MONTH))
					VAR _PQ = CALCULATE(MAX(Dim_date[YearQuarter]), DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),QUARTER))
					VAR _PY = CALCULATE(MAX(Dim_date[Year]), DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),YEAR))
					VAR _minPM = CALCULATE(MIN(Dim_date[YearMonth]), DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),MONTH))
					VAR _minPQ = CALCULATE(MIN(Dim_date[YearQuarter]), DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),QUARTER))

					VAR _maxPY = CALCULATE(MAX(Dim_date[Year]), DATEADD(Dim_date[Date],-SELECTEDVALUE('N Period'[N Period]),YEAR))
					VAR _PMs = format(_minPM,"Mm/YYYY") &" to "& FORMAT(_maxPM ,"Mm/YYYY")
					VAR _PQs = _minPQ &" to "&_maxPQ 
					VAR _PYs = _minPY&" to "&_maxPY
					var _PRE =
					SWITCH( SELECTEDVALUE(_period_select[_period_para Order]),
					0, IF(HASONEFILTER(Dim_date[YearMonth3]) ,FORMAT(_PM,"Mm/YYYY") , _PMs ),
					1, IF(HASONEFILTER(Dim_date[YearQuarter3]),_PQ, _PQs),
					2, IF(HASONEFILTER(Dim_date[Year]),_PY  , _PYs ),
					BLANK())
